questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if SAH Newport, SAH Avalon and Pittwater Animal Hospital are close competitors and there are not many alternatives nearby.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.

To better understand your views, please provide a brief description of the reasons for your interest in the Acquisition (for example, whether you are a customer, employee, competing veterinary practice or a supplier of pet related services on the Northern Beaches or surrounding areas).
